titleStmt.title: SII 26.63: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 63. (A.R. No. 61 of 1909.) TIRUKKAḺUKKUṈṞAM, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the kitchen in the Bhaktavatsalēśvara temple, right of entrance.
The details of date, viz., Ishabha-śu. 13, Sunday, Aśvati correspond to 1348 A.D., April 27, but the paksha was bahuḷa.

This inscription records that some persons (names given) belonging to Puduppaṭṭiṉam alias Sōḻamāttāṇḍanallūr Uṟaiyūraṉi in Moṉdūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Āmūr-kōṭṭam, a district of Jayaṅgōṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, sold their village Maṅgalam for 350 poṉ to the temple of Tirukkaḻukkuṉṟamuḍaiyanāyaṉār at Tirukkaḻukkuṉṟam in Kaḷattūr-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
maṅkalam svastiśrī . tiruvāykeḻvimuṉṉāka cakalalokaccakravatti śrīirācaṉārāyaṇaṉ campuvarāyarkku yāṇṭu 10vatu Iṣapanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu
trayodaśiyum nāyaṟṟukiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvati nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Āmurkkoṭṭattu moṉtūrnāṭṭu putuppaṭṭiṉam Āṉa
coḻamāttāṇṭanallūr Uṟaiyūraṇiaḻakiyaṉāyaṉ tirukkaḻukkuṉṟa Uṭaiyāṉum tirumaṇamāyal Uṭaiyāṉum kuṉṟamaṟiṉtāṉum Irācarācatevaṉ
tirukkaḻukkuṉṟa Uṭaiyā(ṉ)ṉum tevāṇṭaiyum Attiyūr Āḻvāṉ tirukkaḻukkuṉṟa Uṭaiyāṉum ciraṅkanātaṉum tiruvaraṅka Uṭaiyāṉ Attiyūr Āḻvā(ṉ)ṉum Ivvaṉaiva
rom kāṇivilaipramāṇam Immaṇṭalattu kaḷattūr koṭṭattu tirukkaḻukkuṉṟattu Uṭaiyār tirukkaḻukkuṉṟam Uṭaiya ṉāyaṉārkku tirunāmattukāṇi Āka viṟṟukkuṭutta bhūmi
vilaipramāṇam Icaivu kaiccāttu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa maṅkalattukku Ellai Āvatu kiḻpārkku Ellai Īcaiellaikku meṟkum teṉpārkku Ellai
Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉam tirumārampākkam Īccacaṅkāraṇai Ammaṇampākkam Ivvūrkka(ḷ)ḷil Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpārkku Ellai Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi tirukkaḻukkuṉṟattu Ellai
kku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkke(e)llai Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatānam koṟṟamaṅkalattu Ellaikku teṟkum Āka Iṉāṟppārkku Ellaikkum naṭuuppaṭṭa nirnilamum kollai nilamum nattamum maramum kiṇaṟum
maṉṟum kaṉṟumeypā(ḻ)ḻum kāṭum meṭum Eri niṟroṭukā(l)lum maṟṟum Eṟppeṭṭa pirāpttikaḷḷum Uṭpaṭa Uṭaiyār tirukkaḻukuṉṟa Uṭaiya ṉāyaṉārkku tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka viṟṟu
k kuṭuttu koḷvatāka Emmil Icaiṉta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṭakkum varaci paṭāta nalppaṇam 3 100 5 10 Ippaṇam muṉṉūṟṟu Aimpatukkum Iṉta maṅkalam nāṉkel
laikku Uḷppaṭṭa nañcai nilamum puñcai nilamum maṉṟum kaṉṟumeypāḻum kāṭu koṭumeṭu Ēriyum Ēri nirkoppum maramum kiṇaṟum Uḷppaṭa vilai Āvatākavum
Itukku Ituve cācanamākavum Itukku Itu Allatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟuti poruḷ celaolaikāṭṭu Eṉṉappeṟātākavum Ivvūrkku Epperppaṭṭa kallum Illai
Ippaṭikku Innāyaṉār śrī paṇṭārattile Ippaṇam muṉṉūṟṟu Aimpatum poruḷuṟakkaikkoṇṭu Irukālāvatum mukkālāvatum Uṭaiyār tirukkaḻukkuṉṟam Uṭaiya
ṉāyaṉārkku tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Uṟai yūraṇi Ivvaṉaivarom Ippaṭikku Ivai Aḻakiyaṉāyaṉ tirukkaḻukkuṉṟam Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai tirumaṇamāyal Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuṉṟam Aṟiṉtāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Irācarācatevaṉ tirukkakuḻukuṉṟam Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tevāṇṭai Eḻuttu
Ivai Attiyūr Āḻvāṉ tirukkakuḻukkuṉṟam Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ciraṅkaṉātaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvaraṅkam Uṭaiyāṉ Attiyūr Āḻvaraṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
Ivai taḷavāṉamalaipperumāḷ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.63 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
